description: Internationalize the 'library-manager' Java console application located at ~/IdeaProjects/library-manager. Extract all hardcoded user-facing English strings into a resource bundle named 'messages_en.properties' in src/main/resources and provide Spanish ('messages_es.properties') and French ('messages_fr.properties') translations for all keys. Update the Java code to use 'ResourceBundle' for dynamic string loading and modify Main.java to accept a locale code (e.g., 'es', 'fr') as the first command-line argument to switch languages. Ensure the project compiles successfully.
